initial_draft:

Accepting this trade would give me 30 dollars. Rejecting would result in both of us losing everything. Since I start with nothing, gaining 30 dollars is a significant improvement.

```

<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>

<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message>Accepting the trade. It's a good start for me!</message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
